zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde Von Wasserburg於大約1189年出生在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆沃賀包格 安 德 堂瑙時，她的父親Hallgraf Dietrich Von Wasserburg48歲，母親Heilika von Scheyern Wittelsbach21歲。她於1211年之前與Diepold VII von Vohburg Hohenburg在德國貝也奧培爾巴也爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde Von Wasserburg于大约1189年出生在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 普法分霍分 安 德 易爾姆沃賀包格 安 德 堂瑙时，她的父亲Hallgraf Dietrich Von Wasserburg48岁，母亲Heilika von Scheyern Wittelsbach21岁。她于1211年之前与Diepold VII von Vohburg Hohenburg在德国貝也奧培爾巴也爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde Von Wasserburg was born about 1189, in Vohburg an der Donau, Pfaffenhofen, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Hallgraf Dietrich Von Wasserburg, was 48 and her mother, Heilika von Scheyern Wittelsbach, was 21. She married Diepold VII von Vohburg Hohenburg before 1211, in Oberbayern, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

Elle a épousé Diepold VII von Vohburg Hohenburg avant 1211, à Oberbayern, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde Von Wasserburg(이)가 대략 1189년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 p파펜호펜 앤 데르 이름 보h버그 앤 데르 도나에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hallgraf Dietrich Von Wasserburg(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Heilika von Scheyern Wittelsbach(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1211년 이전 독일 베이른 오버베이른에서 Diepold VII von Vohburg Hohenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde Von Wasserburg родилась около 1189 г. в местности фохбург ан дир донау, ландкрис пфаффенофен ан дир илм, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Hallgraf Dietrich Von Wasserburg было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Heilika von Scheyern Wittelsbach, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Diepold VII von Vohburg Hohenburg перед 1211 г. в местности обирбеиирн, беиирн, Германия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.
